subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who is the Desire of all things, Who through a single drop from the ocean of His bounty brought the world of being into existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصود را لایق و سزاست که بقطره از بحر جود عالم وجود را موجود فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
